project.name: UCC File Processor — Assist Agent (optional)
project.description:
Optional embedded AI assist agent (v3.0). Implements the AssistAgent SPI from the core module and is loaded in-process by SourceService when present on the classpath.
ALL AI/LLM dependencies (LangChain4j, the Ollama client, and — in connected builds — hosted-model SDKs for Gemini/Claude/ChatGPT) belong ONLY in this module, so the core fat-JAR stays lean. The air-gapped build omits hosted SDKs, making "local-only" a packaging guarantee rather than a config flag.
M0 status: skeleton only — the SPI wiring plus a no-op provider that proves the cross-module integration. Real skills (explain-entity, nl-to-schedule, suggest-config, kpi-to-sql, diagnose-and-alert) arrive from M2 onward (see docs/v3-plan.md).
